name: uncorked-web
description: Uncorked (Flowtear) — web app wrapped by Capacitor for Android. Shares the /contracts source-of-truth with the native SwiftUI iOS app.

scripts.test: node web/core/engine.test.mjs && node web/core/store.test.mjs && node web/core/report.test.mjs && node web/core/rewards.js && node web/core/stretchLibrary.js
scripts.apk: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
